title: galactia regularis
intro: Galactia regularis, also known as American milkpea, is a climbing vine native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate congestion and soothe irritated throats. Herbal preparations of Galactia regularis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including bronchitis, asthma, and sore throats.
